subtitle: 黑白熊晚点到
opus_summary: Spike Chunsoft宣布《弹丸论破2x2》从原计划2026年延期至2027年初，并首次介绍新故事混编模式Slayhem Mode，该模式将提供不同受害者、凶手和诡计。

paragraphs.en: Spike Chunsoft has announced that Danganronpa 2x2 has been delayed to early 2027.
paragraphs.cn: Spike Chunsoft宣布，《弹丸论破2x2》已经延期至2027年初。

paragraphs.en: The studio behind the Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair remaster confirmed it will no longer make its previously planned 2026 release schedule, with a statement published by producer Shohei Sakakibara. Spike Chunsoft did not confirm exactly why it decided to delay Danganronpa 2x2 but did attempt to cushion the blow with first details about a new story remix feature called Slayhem Mode.
paragraphs.cn: 这家负责《弹丸论破2：再见绝望学园》重制版的工作室确认，本作将无法赶上此前计划的2026年发售窗口。制作人榊原昌平发布了声明。Spike Chunsoft没有明确说明为何决定延期《弹丸论破2x2》，但试图用一个名为Slayhem Mode的新故事混编功能的首批细节来缓和打击。

paragraphs.en: "While development has been progressing toward a 2026 release, we have decided to move the launch to early 2027," Sakakibara said. "We will share a more specific release date at a later time.
paragraphs.cn: 榊原说：「虽然开发一直以2026年发售为目标推进，但我们已经决定将发售时间调整至2027年初。我们将在日后分享更具体的发售日期。」

paragraphs.en: "We are continuing to work to bring you the best possible experience. We sincerely appreciate your patience as development continues, and we look forward to sharing further updates with you soon."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们会继续努力，为大家带来尽可能好的体验。非常感谢各位在开发继续期间保持耐心，我们也期待很快与你们分享更多更新。」

paragraphs.en: As for Danganronpa 2x2's Slayhem Mode, players were told to expect it to feature a new version of the original 2012 experience that tells a "completely different storyline." All we know about the mode for now is that it follows a new chain of events with " different victims, culprits, and tricks" and features about 20% more content than Danganronpa 2x2's Original mode. Both story options will be available from the beginning of the game.
paragraphs.cn: 至于《弹丸论破2x2》的Slayhem Mode，玩家被告知可以期待它呈现一个新版2012年原作体验，讲述一条「完全不同的故事线」。目前我们只知道，该模式会沿着一连串新的事件展开，包含「不同的受害者、凶手和诡计」，并且内容量比《弹丸论破2x2》的Original模式多约20%。两个故事选项都会从游戏一开始就可用。

paragraphs.en: Spike Chunsoft also took its delay announcement as an opportunity to confirm that Danganronpa 2x2 comes with 3D world map instead of a side-scrolling map. Character portraits have also been updated. You can see in-development screenshots below.
paragraphs.cn: Spike Chunsoft也借延期公告确认，《弹丸论破2x2》将采用3D世界地图，而不是横向卷轴地图。角色立绘也已经更新。你可以在下方看到开发中的截图。

paragraphs.en: Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair fans were told they'd be able to revisit the story of Monokuma and Hope's Peak Academy when Danganronpa 2x2 was announced during a Nintendo Direct later last year. Although it's not expected to launch for a few months later than fans may have expected, it is still on track to release for PC, Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X | S.
paragraphs.cn: 在《弹丸论破2x2》于去年晚些时候的任天堂直面会上公布时，《弹丸论破2：再见绝望学园》粉丝被告知，他们将能够重新体验黑白熊和希望之峰学园的故事。虽然它预计会比粉丝原本期待的时间晚几个月推出，但仍计划登陆PC、任天堂Switch、Switch 2、PlayStation 5和XBOX Series。
